# The Breathing Bell
> A guided breathwork and yoga nidra web app for nervous system regulation, stress relief, and deep sleep. Created by Omi Bell, certified breathwork practitioner and founder of The 3B Society.

## What it does
The Breathing Bell offers guided breathwork and yoga nidra sessions organised around three pillars: Body (nervous system regulation and physical rest), Business (focus and mental clarity for high-performers and entrepreneurs), and Belonging (connection and community care).

Sessions are personalised based on how the user is feeling — maintaining, wound up, overwhelmed, or on the edge — and what area of life they want to address. Techniques include Box Breathing (4-4-4-4), Double Inhale (cyclic sighing), Yoga Nidra (guided conscious rest), and 4-7-8 Breathing (members only).

## Who it's for
Anyone seeking stress relief, better sleep, nervous system regulation, or deep relaxation — from overwhelmed professionals to curious beginners who have never tried breathwork before. Particularly useful for entrepreneurs, business leaders, people recovering from burnout, and anyone managing chronic stress or sleep difficulties.

## Science
- Double Inhale (cyclic sighing): Stanford University research identifies this as the most effective real-time stress reduction technique available.
- Box Breathing: Used by Navy SEALs and first responders for nervous system regulation under pressure.
- Yoga Nidra: 20–30 minutes of Yoga Nidra is associated with the restorative equivalent of 2–4 hours of sleep.
- 4-7-8 Breathing: The extended exhale strongly activates the parasympathetic nervous system, reducing anxiety and aiding sleep onset.

## Creator
Omi Bell — certified breathwork practitioner, Reiki practitioner, founder of Black Girl Ventures and The 3B Society.

## Pricing
Free to start. No credit card required. Members unlock additional features including session history (Quiet Log) and the 4-7-8 breathing technique.
